items.markdown:
![8 Best Mailchimp Report Templates in 2026 | Coupler.io Blog](https://api.dataforseo.com/cdn/i/05120925-3675-0139-0000-d43c7ebffa4e:4)
Mailchimp’s reporting tool `provides comprehensive analytics for email, SMS, and automation campaigns` , allowing users to track engagement metrics like open rates, click-through rates, and conversions. Available to paid plans, these analytics enable users to create custom reports, visualize performance data, and gain insights into audience behavior to improve marketing strategies.[](https://mailchimp.com/features/reports-and-analytics/#:~:text=Start%20Free%20Trial-,Marketing%20analytics%20platform,Start%20comparing) [[1]](https://mailchimp.com/features/reports-and-analytics/)[[2]](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=0RaEmyiiASA&t=37)[[3]](https://www.youtube.com/shorts/OaNJdxDU7Tw)[[4]](https://www.youtube.com/shorts/XKXA1paILQU)[[5]](https://mailchimp.com/help/create-custom-reports/)

**Key Features of Mailchimp Reports** 

- **[Custom Reports](https://www.google.com/search?q=Custom+Reports&csui=3&hl=en&gl=US&uule=w+CAIQIFISCQs2MuSEtepUEUK33kOSuTsc&ved=2ahUKEwi748fjjrOUAxW5hv0HHb01G3gQgK4QegoIAggACAAIARAN):** Allows users to select specific metrics—such as opens, clicks, unsubscribes, and revenue—and filter by date range, campaign type, or audience.
- **Email Performance Metrics:** Tracks total opens, click-through rates, delivery rates, and unique clicks to measure content effectiveness.
- **E-commerce Tracking:** Integrates with stores to link campaign clicks directly to revenue, orders, and average order value.
- **Behavioral Data:** Provides insights into top locations, device types used, and the top-clicked links within campaigns.
- **Comparison & Export:** Users can compare campaign performance over time and export report data (CSV) for deeper analysis.[](https://mailchimp.com/help/about-email-campaign-reports/) [[1]](https://mailchimp.com/help/about-email-campaign-reports/)[[2]](https://www.youtube.com/shorts/OaNJdxDU7Tw)[[3]](https://mailchimp.com/help/create-custom-reports/)[[4]](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=LrEdT28U7Kc)[[5]](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=0RaEmyiiASA&t=37)[[6]](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=opX2ojZjDEQ)[[7]](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WQRG01JMDz4)[[8]](https://www.youtube.com/shorts/XKXA1paILQU)

**Accessing Reports** 

1. Navigate to the **Analytics** tab in the Mailchimp dashboard.
2. Select **Reports** to view an overview of your campaign results.
3. Choose **Custom Reports** to build tailored, in-depth visualizations.[](https://mailchimp.com/help/create-custom-reports/#:~:text=more%20with%20filters.-,Create%20and%20build%20a%20report,%2C%20Campaign%20type%2C%20or%20Audience.) [[1]](https://mailchimp.com/help/create-custom-reports/)[[2]](https://www.youtube.com/shorts/OaNJdxDU7Tw)[[3]](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=LrEdT28U7Kc)

**Key Metrics to Monitor** 

- **Open Rate:** Measures how many recipients opened the email, indicating subject line effectiveness.
- **Click-Through Rate (CTR):** Measures engagement with the email content.
- **Bounce Rate:** Identifies email addresses that did not receive the message, indicating list health.
- **Unsubscribes & Abuse Reports:** Helps monitor audience satisfaction and content relevance.[](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=LrEdT28U7Kc) [[1]](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=LrEdT28U7Kc)[[2]](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WQRG01JMDz4)

**Custom Report Builder**   
Within the report builder, users can customize views, add filters, and save reports for future monitoring.[](https://mailchimp.com/help/create-custom-reports/#:~:text=more%20with%20filters.-,Create%20and%20build%20a%20report,%2C%20Campaign%20type%2C%20or%20Audience.) [[1]](https://mailchimp.com/help/create-custom-reports/)[[2]](https://www.youtube.com/shorts/XKXA1paILQU)

expanded_element.title: Why We're Moving Away from Mailchimp for Email Campaigns
expanded_element.description: After Intuit acquired the company, we saw pricing steadily increase while functionality stayed the same—or became more glitchy. Some of the pain points we've run into: Rising costs that scale with your list size —MailChimp used to be free for up to 2,000 contacts.

expanded_element.title: About Open and Click Rates - Mailchimp
expanded_element.description: Mailchimp loads a tiny, transparent image into each email and counts how often the image is downloaded for delivered emails. The image is invisible to your recipients. Open rate tracking relies on images, so it isn't 100% accurate.

expanded_element.title: Getting Started with Reports | Mailchimp
expanded_element.description: Your Mailchimp account contains data about your campaigns, website, audience, and more. Mailchimp compiles this data into various reports that provide powerful insights to help inform your next steps and marketing strategy.

items.title: How to create a report in Mailchimp?

expanded_element.title: Create a Comparative Report | Mailchimp
expanded_element.description: Click Analytics, then click Reports. Click Create Comparative Report. If you have more than one audience, click the Select an audience drop-down and choose the one you want to work with. After you select an audience, we'll display the regular emails and RSS automations sent within the last 18 months.
